meta.title: Jesus Bernal — Founder of Orbita POS
meta.description: Solo founder building Orbita POS: point-of-sale with vision AI, offline mode, and electronic invoicing for small businesses in Mexico. Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL.
meta.ogDescription: Solo founder. Complete point-of-sale system for small businesses in Mexico. Code, design, and infra — one person.
meta.twitterDescription: Solo founder. Point-of-sale system with vision AI for small businesses in Mexico.
meta.softwareDescription: Point-of-sale system with vision AI, offline mode, and electronic invoicing for small businesses in Mexico.

hero.subtitle: Software engineer. I build with Rust, Go, and TypeScript — from cryptography and search engines to full-stack apps. My main product is

projects.title: What I'm building
projects.hobbyNote: Projects marked as hobby run on free-tier hosting (Hugging Face Spaces, Turso free tier) — they may take a few seconds to load.
projects.orbitaDescription: Point-of-sale system for small businesses in Mexico. AI vision for camera-based product recognition, real offline mode, electronic invoicing (CFDI), self-service kiosk, mobile app, and multi-location support. Built entirely solo.
projects.shadowDescription: End-to-end encrypted P2P communication. Implements X3DH + Double Ratchet (Signal Protocol), mesh routing, ephemeral messages, dead drops, group messaging with Sender Key, anti-forensics, and plausible deniability. Security audited. Zero servers, zero trust, zero trace.
projects.spiderDescription: Search engine built from scratch. Concurrent crawler, inverted index, BM25 + PageRank, spell correction, autocomplete. No Elasticsearch, no external APIs — everything from scratch in Go.
projects.vertexDescription: Enterprise video conferencing platform. Custom SFU (Selective Forwarding Unit) built from scratch in Rust, adaptive simulcast, screen sharing, chat, waiting room, recording, and admin dashboard. Direct competitor to Zoom and Teams.
projects.stackpediaDescription: Platform where developers share the real tech stack behind their production projects. Honest verdicts, real costs, no sponsored content. Anonymous by default with recovery codes. Rust backend with PostgreSQL.
projects.cfdiDescription: Open source CLI and web app to parse, validate, and convert Mexican electronic invoices (CFDI 4.0) to JSON and CSV.
projects.kovaDescription: Premium headphones ecommerce landing page. 3D product viewer with Three.js, scroll-driven animations, model comparison page, and multi-step preorder checkout. Apple-inspired design.
projects.inariDescription: AI-powered DevOps platform that auto-diagnoses and fixes production incidents. Reads CI failures, generates code fixes, validates through CI, and opens PRs without human intervention. 5 auto-merge safety gates, post-merge regression monitoring, and MCP server for Claude Code, Cursor, and Windsurf.

architecture.title: What I build with
architecture.description: Systems programming, full-stack web, desktop, mobile, cryptography, and search engines. From Rust and Go to Next.js and React Native.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.description: If you're hiring, want to collaborate on a project, or just want to talk about technology — reach out.
